positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_space_vampire
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    vacuum(space)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    sucks(space)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~vacuum(X0) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~sucks(duster)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define plunger(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define vampire(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_space_vampire
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    ~vacuum(X0) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,

cnf(u17,negated_conjecture,
    vampire(space)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~vampire(X0) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~sucks(duster)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    sucks(space)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define plunger(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
